name: css-calipers
description: Reserved package name placeholder for the upcoming CSS-Calipers unit-safety toolkit for CSS.
author: slafleche

scripts.build: npm run build:cjs && npm run build:esm
scripts.build:test: npm run build && npm run test:build
scripts.build:delete: node -e "const { existsSync, rmSync } = require('fs'); const paths = ['dist/cjs', 'dist/esm']; for (const p of paths) { console.log('Scanning', p + '...'); if (existsSync(p)) { console.log('Found', p + ', deleting...'); rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('Deleted', p); } else { console.log(p + ' not found, skipping.'); } }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (!process.env.CSS_CALIPERS_RELEASE) { console.error('Direct npm publish is disabled; use \"npm run release\" instead.'); process.exit(1); }" && npm test && npm run build
scripts.test:build: npm run test:cjs && npm run test:esm
scripts.test:all: npm run test:core && npm run build:test
